ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: From the evil of that which He created
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: from the evil of whatever He has created,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and from the evil of the night when it grows dark,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and from the evil of those ˹witches casting spells by˺ blowing onto knots,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and from the evil of an envier when they envy.”
